name: Gaming Insaan
overview: Gaming Insaan follows YouTuber Nischay Malhan, aka Triggered Insaan, as he leaves his comfort zone to chase an impossible dream: becoming a pro-gamer in just three months. Battling fierce rivals, self-doubt, and overwhelming pressure, Nischay must prove he's more than an entertainer. As tensions rise, will he conquer the esports world or crack under the weight of expectations?

trailers.title: Gaming Insaan - Official Trailer ft. Triggered Insaan | MX Player
